name: Strawberry Sorbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove hulls from berries.
2. In a blender container, place berries, orange juice, milk, and 1/4 cup honey. Cover; blend for 1 minute or until smooth. (If desired, strain the raspberry mixture to remove seeds.)
3. Pour the mixture into a 9x9x2-inch pan. Cover; freeze for 2 to 3 hours or until almost firm.
4. In a mixer bowl, beat egg whites with an electric mixer on medium speed until soft peaks form. Gradually add 1 tablespoon honey, beating on high speed until stiff peaks form.
5. Break the frozen mixture into chunks and transfer it to a chilled large mixing bowl. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth. Fold in the egg whites. Return to the pan.
6. Cover; freeze for 6 to 8 hours or until firm.
7. To serve, scrape across the frozen mixture with a spoon and mound in dessert dishes.
